notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.
